# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for memcached exposed port and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  clusterIP: None
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
    protocol: TCP
    name: memcached
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 11211
        fsGroup: 11211
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:1.6-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
          name: memcached
          protocol: TCP
        args:
        - "-m"
        - "256"
        - "-c"
        - "1024"
        - "-I"
        - "4m"
        - "-l"
        - "127.0.0.1"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 11211
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 11211
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      - name: memcached-exporter
        image: prom/memcached-exporter:v0.13.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9150
          name: metrics
          protocol: TCP
        args:
        - "--memcached.address=localhost:11211"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 65534
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "32Mi"
            cpu: "10m"
          limits:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "50m"
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - memcached
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: webapp
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: webapp
    tier: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: webapp
    tier: frontend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: webapp
    tier: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: webapp
        image: webapp:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached.production.svc.cluster.local"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "200m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: cache
        emptyDir: {}
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - webapp
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: worker
    tier: backend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
      tier: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
        tier: backend
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: worker:latest
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
          value: "memcached.production.svc.cluster.local"
        - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
          value: "11211"
        - name: ENVIRONMENT
          value: "production"
        - name: WORKER_CONCURRENCY
          value: "4"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /bin/sh
            - -c
            - pgrep -f worker
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: workdir
          mountPath: /app/work
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: workdir
        emptyDir: {}
      affinity:
        podAntiAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
          - weight: 100
            podAffinityTerm:
              labelSelector:
                matchExpressions:
                - key: app
                  operator: In
                  values:
                  - worker
              topologyKey: kubernetes.io/hostname

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: memcached-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: webapp
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: worker
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: webapp-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
      tier: frontend
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: memcached
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: worker-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
      tier: backend
  policyTypes:
  - Egress
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: memcached
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
